info.name: Armor
info.description: Various Armors from the Pirates campaign

description.p: This shield can have several infusions
This non-magical armor has two embeddings for magical crystals. Placing a magical crystal into the armor's embeddings causes it to gain the crystal's magical effects.
This fur cloak was crafted from the pelt of a garmyr, carefully sewn into ratling leather, adorned with the claws of a harpy, and polished with contaminated ichor to give it a dark sheen.
As long as you are attuned to this cloak and are within 5 feet of an enemy creature, all allies near you gain Advantage on attack rolls against that creature.

Pacord Breath (2/Long Rest): As an action, you can lift the pelt, and a surge of black mist pours out from its fibers.
Demonic mist appears within a 20-foot radius for 1 minute.
Creatures that begin their turn within the mist must make a Constitution save (DC 14) or take 2d10 necrotic damage.
As an action, you can lift the pelt, and a surge of black mist pours out from its fibers.

ul.li: Demonic mist appears within a 20-foot radius for 1 minute.
Creatures that begin their turn within the mist must make a Constitution save (DC 14) or take 2d10 necrotic damage.

sheet.description: Demonic Mist appears in a 20-foot Emanation for 1 minute. Creatures that begin their turn within the mist must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 2d10 necrotic damage.

description.p: This plate armor includes a helmet and is hermetically sealed when worn. You gain the following benefits when you wear it and the helmet visor is closed. It can be added as an upgrade to any armor:

ul.li: You are immune to disease and the Poisoned condition and have Advantage on saving throws against all effects that cause Contamination.
You have Resistance to Necrotic and Poison damage.

description.p: The armor needs to be constantly fueled by Aether-Crystals. The bigger the Crystal, the longer the effect:
This item has a green crystal embedded within it that contains magical energy.

While having this armor or shield equipped, you can cast the Shield spell once per short rest. This magic is inherent to the crystal embedded in the item, so it doesn't require you to use a spell slot and you do not gain the ability to cast this spell outside of using this item. When casting this spell, you only need the somatic component, which consists of tapping the embedded crystal twice.
